description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense arrangement of trees, featuring a prominent covered front porch with steps leading up to the entrance. The main structure is rectangular with a gable roof, and there is a detached garage to one side, connected by a curved driveway. The property includes outdoor amenities such as a small fire pit area with chairs and a curved wooden bench. The trees encircle the house, providing privacy and a natural setting, with a mix of coniferous and deciduous varieties. The exterior appears to be finished in a neutral beige color, and the roof is similarly toned. The overall layout suggests a suburban or semi-rural residential setting with a focus on outdoor living.
description: A beige, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered front porch, detached garage, and surrounded by dense trees and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, curved driveway, detached garage, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the garage, side of the house, and the dense tree arrangement around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the bungalow mostly obscured by trees, and the garage visible to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back and side of the house, garage, and more of the surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
